title: Single Element in a Sorted Array
hints: Since the array is sorted, pairs are adjacent. Notice how the index parity of the first element of each pair changes once the single element appears.
Use binary search on the index. Check if the midpoint index is even or odd to determine if the single element is to the left or right.
If the midpoint is even, the pair should start there. If not, the single element has already disrupted the pattern, so look left.
